name: Skillz Inc.
summary: In this Annual Report, when we use the terms the Company, Skillz, we, us and our, unless otherwise indicated or the context otherwise requires, we are referring to Skillz Inc. and its wholly-owned subsidiaries. Overview We were founded on one simple belief: competition holds the power to unleash possibilities in all of us. We are all born with skills and when we are able to apply those skills through competition, we can achieve great things. That is the guiding principle behind why we are advanc...
